entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Interventions that are nutrition-specific and nutrition-sensitive used to improve dietary diversity and combat undernutrition

entities.name: NUTRITION-SPECIFIC INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Interventions specifically designed to address immediate causes of undernutrition

entities.name: NUTRITION-SENSITIVE INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Interventions that address the underlying causes of undernutrition

entities.name: DIETARY DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of food consumed, which is improved through agricultural interventions to combat undernutrition

entities.name: UNDERNUTRITION
entities.description: A nutritional deficiency state that agricultural interventions aim to combat

entities.name: HOME-GROWN PRODUCTS
entities.description: Produce grown at the household level used as ingredients for nutritious meals

entities.name: LOCALLY AVAILABLE INGREDIENTS
entities.description: Ingredients sourced from the local environment used to create nutritious meals

entities.name: CHILD NUTRITION
entities.description: The nutritional health of children, supported by specific recipes, technologies, and formulations

entities.name: PACKAGED INTEGRATED TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Integrated technological approaches used to improve child nutrition

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD PROCESSED MILK PRODUCTS
entities.description: Milk-based products processed at the household level to support child nutrition

entities.name: VEGETABLE-BASED FORMULATIONS
entities.description: Nutritional formulations based on vegetables to support child nutrition
